channel.title: volantlabs.ai Perspectives
channel.description: Essays and field notes behind Vellis.

item.title: The graph is a theory
item.description: Why legibility is the wedge for agentic software, and why the graph should be treated as an executable point of view rather than passive storage.

item.title: Runtime-native controls: policy where execution happens
item.description: A field note on why governance should sit near the write path, not in a disconnected approval ritual after the fact.

item.title: Open data, proprietary intelligence
item.description: Vellis is an open graph engine. This field note draws the line that keeps it open while the operational intelligence organizations build on it stays their own.
